name: CMAT3D
description: 3D matrix block - displays matrix data as 3D colored surface visualization

realParameters.description: Colormap RGB values for 3D surface coloring
realParameters.note: Contains colormap gradient plus rotation/view angle data

xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="..." parent="..." interfaceFunctionName="CMAT3D" blockType="c" dependsOnU="1" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="cmat3d" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="CMAT3D">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="5" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="-1"/>
    <data line="1" column="0" value="-1"/>
    <data line="2" column="0" value="jet(25)"/>
    <data line="3" column="0" value="0"/>
    <data line="4" column="0" value="100"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="1" width="77">
    <!-- Colormap data plus view angle data -->
  </ScilabDouble>
  <ScilabInteger as="integerParameters" height="1" width="5" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
    <data line="0" column="1" value="100"/>
    <data line="0" column="2" value="25"/>
    <data line="0" column="3" value="1"/>
    <data line="0" column="4" value="1"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: 5-parameter exprs (vs 3 for CMATVIEW) - adds view angle parameters
exprs line 0-1: alpha/theta view angles (-1 = auto)
Integer parameters: [min, max, colors, alpha_enable, theta_enable]
More complex than CMATVIEW with 3D view capabilities
criticalRules: Control port is refresh trigger, NOT clock
exprs line 0: alpha rotation angle (-1 = auto)
exprs line 1: theta view angle (-1 = auto)
exprs lines 2-4: colormap, min, max (same as CMATVIEW)
Integer parameters last 2 values control angle auto/manual
